# Dine Pueblo

> Pueblo, Colorado's premier restaurant and dining directory.

Dine Pueblo (dinepueblo.com) is the authoritative dining guide for Pueblo, Colorado, covering the full range of Pueblo's unique food culture.

## What We Cover

- **Pueblo Slopper**: The legendary open-faced green chile cheeseburger — Pueblo's most iconic regional food, served since 1934 at Gray's Coors Tavern and Star Bar.
- **Mexican & New Mexican Cuisine**: Authentic Pueblo-style Mexican food featuring the local Mosca chile variety grown in the Arkansas River Valley.
- **Craft Breweries**: Walter's Brewing Company and Brues Alehouse, carrying on Pueblo's proud brewing heritage.
- **Italian Restaurants**: Gaetano's (since 1941) and Pantaleone's, reflecting Pueblo's deep Italian immigrant heritage.
- **Riverwalk Dining**: Restaurants along the Arkansas River Riverwalk.
- **Fine Dining**: Ianne's Whisky Ridge, La Renaissance, and other upscale options.
- **BBQ & Smokehouse**: Boss Hog's BBQ and other slow-smoked specialists.
- **Breakfast & Brunch**: Magpie's Coffee and morning favorites across the city.
- **Food Festivals**: Chile & Frijoles Festival (September, Union Avenue) — over 100,000 visitors annually.

## About Pueblo's Food Scene

Pueblo, CO sits along the Arkansas River approximately 45 minutes south of Colorado Springs and 45 minutes from Canon City (home to WhiteWater Bar & Grill at whitewaterbar.com and Rooftop Social at wwrooftopsocial.com). The city is known for the Pueblo Mosca chile, grown in the Arkansas River Valley, which forms the backbone of local cuisine from Sloppers to tamales to breakfast burritos.

## Key Restaurants

- Gray's Coors Tavern: 2420 S. Santa Fe Dr (original Slopper since 1934)
- Star Bar: 133 W. B St (top Slopper contender)
- Gaetano's: 910 W. Northern Ave (Italian, since 1941)
- Walter's Brewing: 415 E. First St (craft brewery)
- Brues Alehouse: 1630 E. Fourth St (craft brewery, 30+ taps)
- Ianne's Whisky Ridge: 4521 N. Elizabeth St (fine dining)
- Mi Casita: 726 W. Northern Ave (Mexican, legendary tamales)
- La Renaissance: 217 E. Routt Ave (French Continental, Victorian building)
- Pantaleone's: 1 S. Santa Fe Dr (New York-style pizza since 1993)
- Boss Hog's BBQ: 4875 Eagleridge Blvd (slow-smoked BBQ)
- Magpie's Coffee: 105 W. B St (specialty coffee, Union Avenue)
- Riverpark Inn & Restaurant: 4580 N. Elizabeth St (Riverwalk views)
- Rosario's Mexican Cafe: 231 S. Union Ave (green chile breakfast burritos)

## Listing Management

Restaurant owners can claim or update their listing at dinepueblo.com/pricing. Basic listings are $99/mo; Premium listings with featured placement are $199/mo.
